hero.title: Flutter Developer
hero.description: I build Flutter apps that solve real problems — from personal finance tracking to a cpns exam app I built for my own exam prep.
hero.storyDescription: Flutter gives me the power to write once and deploy everywhere — Android, iOS, macOS, Windows, Linux, and Web. When a client needs a feature update, I push it once and it reaches all platforms instantly. No separate teams. No duplicated work. Just clean, efficient code that reaches everyone.

experience.title: What I built
experience.contactMessage: Halo Imam, saya tertarik dengan project {project}

projects.title: All Projects
projects.subtitle: Explore my portfolio of mobile applications

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Got a project idea? Or just wanna chat about Flutter? I'm down. Usually reply within a day.

contact.successMessage: Got it. I'll get back to you soon.

1.title: Financial Notes (DompetKu)
1.description: Personal finance tracking app I built to stop wondering where my money went. Charts, PDF export, fingerprint login, home screen widget.

2.title: Part of English
2.description: English learning app I made because I needed to improve my vocabulary. Grammar, Idioms, Collocations, spaced repetition, and TTS.

3.title: Try Outcpns
3.description: cpns exam practice app I built for my own test prep. Clean Architecture, works offline, progress tracking per category.

4.title: CalcPro
4.description: Calculator app with everything I needed — Scientific, Unit Conversion, BMI, Split Bill, Currency, Loan calculator.
